hooks.command: test -f progress.md && echo 'QRSPI pipeline is active. Before stopping, ensure: (1) progress.md is updated with latest activity, (2) current status reported to human, (3) next action and who needs to act is clearly stated.' || true
test -f progress.md && echo 'QRSPI subagent finished. Verify: (1) agent produced expected output in reports/ or tasks.json, (2) progress.md updated, (3) human notified of result.' || true
